advanced.disclaimer: Indicative only, using the site’s displayed rates; may differ from market or bureau prices.

footer.siteImportance: We bring Syrian pound indicators, gold, fuel, global FX and crypto together in one place—so you can follow the market clearly on phone or desktop, with data refreshed regularly from multiple sources instead of jumping between many sites.

seo.homeLead: This page brings together the Syrian pound against major currencies, gold and fuel prices, plus global FX pairs and cryptocurrencies. Data is refreshed regularly from multiple sources for quick market context.
seo.homeKeywords: Syrian pound rate, SYP exchange, USD to SYP, gold price, fuel, crypto

legal.privacyMetaDescription: Privacy policy for the Syrian Pound Rate site: data we process, cookies, advertising, and your rights.
privacyParagraphs: This policy explains how the “Syrian Pound Rate” website and related pages handle information when you browse our public content. We aim for transparent, professional practices suited to an informational financial-indicators service.

The site is provided as a news-style dashboard that aggregates rates, metrics, and statistics from multiple sources. Using the site is not a contract and does not constitute investment advice; you should always verify with official or licensed sources before transfers or financial decisions.

For ordinary browsing we usually do not require an account. Limited technical data may be collected automatically on our servers or at our hosting provider, such as truncated IP addresses, browser and OS type, timestamps, requested paths, and error logs, for security, abuse prevention, reliability, and performance.

We may use cookies or browser storage for functional purposes—for example language preference, light/dark theme, or a narrow technical session. You can block or delete cookies in your browser; some convenience features may not work as intended.

If advertising is enabled (for example Google AdSense or similar networks), those partners may process data under their own policies (such as technical identifiers or interaction with ads). Please review Google’s and the relevant network’s privacy notices. We label ad placements where practicable and do not sell your personal data to third parties.
The site may link to third-party websites (price sources, social networks, partners). We do not control their privacy practices; review their policies before submitting information.

If you submit forms (such as an API access request), we use the information only to process that request and related communication, and not for unrelated purposes without a legal basis or consent where required.

We apply reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect systems from unauthorized access. No online service is perfectly secure; if you notice abuse or a vulnerability, please contact us through channels published on the site when available.
We retain technical logs for as long as needed to operate the site, meet legal obligations, and resolve disputes, then delete or minimize processing when no longer necessary.

Depending on applicable law you may have rights to access, correct, object to, or erase personal data you have provided through official forms; we may need to verify your identity. Additional rights may apply in the EU, UK, Switzerland, and other jurisdictions.

The site is intended for a general audience and we do not knowingly collect data from children. If you are a parent and believe a child has provided data, please contact us so we can take appropriate steps.
Information may be processed on servers in other countries where hosting or ad partners operate. We seek providers that offer appropriate contractual safeguards where relevant.
We may update this policy from time to time. The review date is shown above. Continued use after changes means you accept the updated version unless the law requires otherwise.

All prices, spreads, and indicators on the platform are approximate and indicative and may reflect delays, administrative adjustments, or technical variation. Do not rely on them alone for large transfers, tax, or legal decisions without checking a qualified source.
We do not provide financial, tax, or legal advice. Any investment or FX decision remains entirely your responsibility after verifying trusted sources.
For privacy questions related to this policy, please use contact methods published in the footer or on the site when available, and we will respond where reasonably practicable.
legal.aboutMetaDescription: Learn about the Syrian Pound Rate platform, our mission, data sources, and limits of accuracy.
aboutParagraphs: “Syrian Pound Rate” is an Arabic-first web platform that brings together Syrian pound (SYP) exchange indicators against major currencies, together with gold and fuel prices, global market and commodity indicators, and cryptocurrency prices, in a clear layout for mobile and desktop.

The project was created so users can see a quick market snapshot without jumping across many pages or apps. We focus on structured presentation, periodic updates, and multiple interface languages to serve readers in and beyond the Arabic-speaking region.

We primarily aggregate data from public sources and specialist market websites, with automated or semi-automated fetching depending on server configuration. Operators can adjust sync intervals and administrative offsets from a secure admin panel—so displayed figures may reflect a specific update policy rather than every tick of the live market.

We also provide helper features such as an advanced exchange calculator, shareable price cards, and links to pages like this one, our privacy policy, and API access requests for approved developers, under terms managed by the site operators.

Transparency matters: we present information as indicators and references, not as binding buy/sell offers. Spreads, volatility, and policy changes all mean on-screen numbers can differ from what you receive at a bureau or bank.

The site may display advertising (for example networks suited to informational content). Ads are labeled and separated from editorial content where practicable, to help cover hosting and operations without compromising the independence of how data is shown.
We follow reasonable security practices at the server and application level. Any online service can suffer outages or attacks; we work to reduce risk and recover when needed.
Our team does not provide financial, investment, tax, or legal advice. You remain responsible for verifying official or licensed sources before acting on displayed numbers.
We welcome constructive feedback on usability, terminology, and layout through contact channels published in the footer or elsewhere on the site.

We evolve features over time (live streams for some markets, more instruments, performance work). Page layout and section order may change across releases while keeping the same mission: a single, readable information hub.
We thank our audience for their trust. Our goal is to remain useful, up to date, and respectful of privacy, without making unrealistic financial promises.
For more detail on how we process personal and technical data, please read our Privacy Policy page.

apiPage.metaDescription: Request access to the public rates API, USDT TRC20 payment info, and multi-language examples.
apiPage.title: Application programming interface (API)
apiPage.subtitle: Submit your site details and payment receipt. After admin approval, only your domain may call /api/rates from browsers. Server operators can disable the origin check with API_RATES_ORIGIN_GUARD=false if needed.
apiPage.formHint: All fields are required except the receipt image. Attach a payment screenshot matching the subscription fee shown below.
apiPage.success: Request received. An admin will review it.
apiPage.error: Could not submit. Check the form and try again.
apiPage.payPricing: Subscription: {price} USD (pay in USDT) for {days} days.
apiPage.payAutoExpire: When the period ends, API access for that domain is disabled automatically unless an admin renews it.
apiPage.payNote: After approval, only your domain is whitelisted. Admins can change the price and duration in the dashboard.
apiPage.noWallet: Wallet address is not configured yet in settings.
apiPage.docIntro:
Endpoint: GET /api/rates
Response JSON includes success and data (rates, goldPrice, fuelPrices, siteSettings, …).
When the allowlist is non-empty in admin, the browser must send an Origin header from an allowed domain.
